summary: S&P 500 up 0.6% to fresh all-time high above 7,200; Nasdaq +1.1% (new ATH). Apple +4% on earnings beat driving tech rally. Iran peace proposal via Pakistani mediators pushed oil lower and helped market. April was best monthly performance since 2020 for S&P 500 and Nasdaq. Roblox -24% premarket on guidance cut was notable downside mover.
